chunks.title: Construction of the Temple Exterior
chunks.reason: Describes the dimensions and structural assembly of the temple's outer framework.

chunks.title: Yahweh's Promise to Solomon
chunks.reason: Contains a divine speech promising establishment of the house if Solomon obeys.

chunks.title: Interior Paneling and Sanctum Preparation
chunks.reason: Details the cedar paneling, floor overlay, and construction of the Holy of Holies.

chunks.title: Furnishings of the Inner Sanctuary
chunks.reason: Catalogs the specific dimensions and gold overlay of the cherubim and walls.

chunks.title: Doors and Inner Court Construction
chunks.reason: Describes the making of doors with carvings and the building of the inner court.

chunks.title: Completion Timeline
chunks.reason: Summarizes the start date, completion date, and total duration of the building project.
